CREATE TABLE test_dates (date_expr String, scale UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY date_expr;
SELECT toDateTime64OrDefault(date_expr, scale) AS result FROM test_dates;
SELECT toDateTime64OrDefault(date_expr, scale, 'GMT', toDateTime64('2001-01-01 00:00:00.00', 3)) AS result_with_default FROM test_dates;
SELECT (SELECT toDateTime64OrDefault('invalid_data', 5) FROM test_dates) AS subquery_result;
SELECT t1.date_expr, toDateTime64OrDefault(t1.date_expr, t1.scale) AS converted_date FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN (SELECT 'another_date' AS date_expr, 3 AS scale) AS t2 ON t1.scale = t2.scale;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id UInt32, expr String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrDefault(expr, 3, 'UTC', toDateTime64('2000-01-01 00:00:00', 3)) AS converted_value FROM nested_test;
SELECT id, (SELECT toDateTime64OrDefault(expr, 2) FROM nested_test WHERE id = 2) AS nested_conversion FROM nested_test;
CREATE TABLE joins_test (id UInt32, date_expr String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT j.id, toDateTime64OrDefault(j.date_expr, 3) AS converted_date FROM joins_test AS j WHERE j.id = 1;
